title: Shasta Climber Falls 1.5K Feet, Lives to Tell the Tale
description: One climber's attempt to summit Mount Shasta turned into a 1,500-foot plunge—and a rare survival story. Officials say the 31-year-old woman, part of a group of three "novice" climbers on the Avalanche Gulch route around 13,000 feet, tumbled down the steep fac…
content: One climber's attempt to summit Mount Shasta turned into a 1,500-foot plunge—and a rare survival story. Officials say the 31-year-old woman, part of a group of three "novice" climbers on the Avalanch… [+958 chars]
de: Shasta Climber fällt 1,5000 Fuß hoch, lebt, um die Geschichte zu erzählen. Der Versuch eines Bergsteigers, den Mount Shasta zu besteigen, wurde zu einem 1.500-Fuß-Absturz – und zu einer seltenen Überlebensgeschichte. Beamte sagten, die 31-jährige Frau, Teil einer Gruppe von drei „Anfänger“-Kletterern auf der Avalanche Gulch-Route in etwa 13.000 Fuß Höhe, sei die steile Wand hinuntergestürzt.
en: Shasta Climber Falls 1.5K Feet, Lives to Tell the Tale. One climber's attempt to summit Mount Shasta turned into a 1,500-foot plunge—and a rare survival story. Officials say the 31-year-old woman, part of a group of three "novice" climbers on the Avalanche Gulch route around 13,000 feet, tumbled down the steep fac…
la: Shasta Climber cadit 1.5K Pedes, Vitas narrare fabulam. Conatus unus exhibuit in cacumen Montis Shasta se in immersionem pedis 1,500 - et raram superstitem fabulam. Magistratus dicunt mulierem XXXI annorum, partem globi trium "noviciorum" ascendentium in itinere Avalanche gulch circa 13,000 pedes, praecipitatum fac…

title: Novice climber survives 1,500-foot drop on California's Mount Shasta after helicopter rescue delayed by clouds
description: Climbing rangers hiked up Mount Shasta on foot after cloud cover blocked a direct helicopter rescue of a woman who slid 1,500 feet down Avalanche Gulch.
content: A 31-year-old novice climber survived a roughly 1,500-foot slide down California's Mount Shasta after worsening weather forced rescuers to abandon plans for a direct helicopter rescue, sending climbi… [+4096 chars]
de: Anfänger überlebt einen 1.500-Fuß-Absturz am kalifornischen Mount Shasta, nachdem die Helikopterrettung durch Wolken verzögert wurde. Bergsteiger wanderten zu Fuß den Mount Shasta hinauf, nachdem die Wolkendecke eine direkte Helikopterrettung einer Frau verhinderte, die 1.500 Fuß den Avalanche Gulch hinabgerutscht war.
en: Novice climber survives 1,500-foot drop on California's Mount Shasta after helicopter rescue delayed by clouds. Climbing rangers hiked up Mount Shasta on foot after cloud cover blocked a direct helicopter rescue of a woman who slid 1,500 feet down Avalanche Gulch.
la: Novitius exhibuit superstes 1,500-pedum gutta in monte Shasta Californiae post helicopterum nebulis morantibus liberandum. Scandentes vagantes montem Shasta in pede inspexerunt postquam nubes operimentum obstruxit directum helicopterum liberandum mulieris quae 1,500 pedibus delapsae NIVIS PYLAE.

title: Golden Knights Hand Avalanche Another Loss, Hire Eagles Head Coach Mark Letestu
description: The Golden Knights have poached a key member of the Avalanche organization, hiring Colorado Eagles head coach Mark Letestu after he led the AHL affiliate to the Western Conference Finals in his lone season behind the bench.
content: If you click 'Accept all', we and our partners, including 249 who are part of the IAB Transparency & Consent Framework, will also store and / or access information on a device (in other words, us… [+1046 chars]
de: Golden Knights bescheren Avalanche einen weiteren Verlust, engagieren Eagles-Cheftrainer Mark Letestu. Die Golden Knights haben ein wichtiges Mitglied der Avalanche-Organisation abgeworben und den Cheftrainer der Colorado Eagles, Mark Letestu, engagiert, nachdem er die AHL-Tochter in seiner einzigen Saison hinter der Bank ins Finale der Western Conference geführt hatte.
en: Golden Knights Hand Avalanche Another Loss, Hire Eagles Head Coach Mark Letestu. The Golden Knights have poached a key member of the Avalanche organization, hiring Colorado Eagles head coach Mark Letestu after he led the AHL affiliate to the Western Conference Finals in his lone season behind the bench.
la: Aurei equites manus NIVIS aliud damnum, conducere aquilas caput PETORITUM Mark Letestu. Equites Aurei membri Avalanche organisationis clavem collocaverunt, Colorado aquilae raeda caput conducentes Mark Letestu postquam AHL affiliatum ad Occidentalem Conferentiam Finales duxit in suo soli tempore post scamnum.
